name: no-existing-auth
description: No existing auth domain in state-api. New auth/ directory needed for types, services, and domain store.
relevantCode: Current structure: core/, environment/, meta/, persistence/, schematic/, utils/
recommendation: Create packages/state-api/src/auth/ with: types.ts (IAuthService, AuthUser, AuthSession), supabase.ts, mock.ts, domain.ts (AuthStore MST model)
